ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – Week 9
ham.body:
Hi Professor Smith,

Just a friendly reminder that our semester project is due next Monday, September 23rd. I have attached the latest draft for your review. Please let me know if you need any additional information.

Thank you for your guidance.

Best regards,
Alex Johnson

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Your Microsoft 365 Password is Expiring
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

Microsoft Security Team has detected that your Microsoft 365 password will expire in 24 hours. To avoid disruption, please reset your password immediately by following the link below.

<URL>

If you do not reset within 24 hours, your account will be disabled.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Microsoft Security Team
